feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP GUI及びSAP RouterのWin11 OS対応の確認
entry.content:
There is a plan to update the operating system of the client PC from Win10 to Win11 in the future.

Are the SAP GUI Ver.800 and SAP Router Ver.7.53 patch 422 supported  in Win11 OS?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to change the year in number ranges with nr status
entry.content: I am trying to change the year using Tcode: fbn1 but the system does not recognize it. How to overcome this problem.

entry.title: Vendor Novation in SAP S/4HANA Public Sector Management
entry.content:
Dear Experts, I am looking for information on the SAP Best Practice for supporting a vendor novation in the S/4HANA Public Sector environment. With SAP SRM sundowning in 2027, when a customer is using S/4HANA and Public Sector Management, what is the best practice for handling vendor novations when there are existing contracts and purchase orders in place, specifically when the commitments cover multiple years. For example, a contract and related purchase orders are created in a given fiscal year, let's assume FY23 with Vendor A, and then in FY24, Vendor A is acquired and merged with Vendor B. How should the public sector customer handle this novation? How should the existing contract with Vendor A and now Vendor B be updated? How would the associated purchase orders under this contract be updated for Vendor B while still reflecting the budgeting as applied in FY23?

Is there a best practice for S/4HANA to support closing the previous purchase orders and opening new purchase orders that still reflect the budget period of FY23 but using the new Vendor B that can be reflected against the updated contract with Vendor B that was originally with Vendor A?

Could this be accomplished using the Financial Management (FM) Multi-Year Budget Execution or is there a different or better option for handling the vendor novation?

Thank you!

entry.title: Consumer Proxy to connect to the external SOAP Service Via API key in S4 HANA
entry.content:
We are looking to consume a SOAP service using API key from S4 HANA.

We want to use the Consumer Proxy to connect to the external SOAP Service.

When setting up the logical port in SOAManager, there is no option to use API Key.

Is there a way to connect to a SOAP service from S4 HANA using Consumer Proxy and using API key for authentication.

entry.title: Output type WCOCO
entry.content:
Hi all, 

the requirement of my client is that when It is saved from WCOCO a condition contract for sales rebates It should be triggered an output print with the detail of all the data entered in the CCM both at header and Item level.

In WCOCO I don't see any option for the message determination, how can I trigger a print?

Thanks for your reply!

entry.title: EML: Read All Instances of a BO
entry.content:
In an ABAP RAP project, I want to read all instances of a BusinessObject via the EML statement "READ ..." like

READ ENTITIES OF zstore IN LOCAL MODE
ENTITY store
ALL FIELDS
WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys )
RESULT result_stores.

but without providing any key, since I want to read all instances.

So, basically, I want to do a query "SELECT * FROM mytable" but as an EML statement for a BusinessObject.

Is that possible, and if so, how?

entry.title: API_PROJECT_V3(Create multiple WBS nodes and Get Next Available Project Number)
entry.content:
Hello community. 

I'm trying to create a PS Project(CJ20N) using the API_PROJECT_V3 from Integration Suite and I'm having two problems which I'm not sure what's the best way to solve. 

When I'm going to create the Project, the sending system gives me an existing Project Number so I can use as template, with this Number I also should get the next available number and create it, on S4 I can use the FM CN_SUCHE_FREIE_NUMMER to do that, but it's not an RFC and I didn't find any API to get that number. Is there any way I didn't find or should I create a wrapper for this FM?

My other problem is that I'm trying to copy the WBS structure from the template project into the new one. For that I first read the old Project and then use its data on the POST function. But on the Help Portal I don't find any field to make the link between children and parent WBS nodes. I think I can use WBSElementParentInternalID even though it's not documented on the CREATE structure, but I'm not sure how to fill it since when creating I still don't have the Internal ID

Thanks in advance

entry.title: MRP LIVE MD01N with MRP Controller selection
entry.content:
Dear All,

I want to run MRP in MD01N with selection of MRP controller

PIR--FG(X)-100 QTY 

BOM FG(X)- component a,b,c,d  in which 3 components a,b,c are related to same MRP controller(001 Domestic) & 4th component d is related to different MRP controller(002 Imported).If I will input the FG code whose PIR is there & MRP controller (002 imported) the system is giving error for no planning file entries exists. My requirement is to run the MRP as per MRP controller(002 imported) whose level 1 FG demand exists in the system. If I input only MRP controller in selection screen(002 Imported) system will plan all such components which are having this mrp controller(002-imported) whether there FG demand exists or not in the period. And the MRP results of MRP live which one is the report like MD05.

entry.title: how to disable VMS for DSD shipment or How to config it?
entry.content:
hello guys, we are using DSD Module for shipment in our firm and we have an issue when i enter vehicle sap code (made with IE01 and filled dsd info with ie02) we have following error whic i guess is related to VMS Module which we didn't activate, if it possible tell me how to disbale this for Shipment or how to config it.

error: Could not read the master data of vehicle 10000012

entry.title: Generate Accounting entries for mouvement 305
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts, 

I have a requirement to generate accounting entries for mouvement 305 as it's not generated in the standard config

The actual accounting for two step mouvement 303/305, it's similar to one step mouvement 301 , and my client want to show that once the stock is in transit it will go to a speciel GL account,  then once I receive the goods with 305, I will remove from the special GL account to the onther account 

Could you please help me

entry.title: Manage Projects with material procurement in S/4 Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear All,

 

is it possible to manage projects (WBS) with material procurement in S/4 Public Cloud?

Tks

Stefano

entry.title: Question for EWM (on S4HANA) SAP template security roles in Obsolete status
entry.content:
We are going to create the new EWM system customizing security roles by referring to the system template roles /SCWM/ following the master guide, but noticed all /SCWM/ roles are in Obsolete status while not inactive status. Should we still be able to use these "Obsolete" template roles to create our new customizing roles?

RoleShort Description 
/SCWM/ANALYSTEWM: Warehouse AnalystObsolete 
/SCWM/BCV_USEREWM: Business Context Viewer UserObsolete 
/SCWM/COUNTEREWM: Physical Inventory CounterObsolete 
/SCWM/DAS_ADMINISTRATORAdministrator for Dock Appointment SchedulingObsolete 
/SCWM/DAS_CP_CLERKCheckpoint Clerk for Dock Appointment SchedulingObsolete 
/SCWM/DAS_EXT_CARR_PLANNERAppointment Planner for Carrier in Dock Appointment SchedulingObsolete 
/SCWM/DAS_SPECIALISTSpecialist for Dock Appointment SchedulingObsolete 
/SCWM/DAS_TO_EWM_INTEGRATIONTechnical Role for Dock Appointment Scheduling Integration to EWMObsolete 
/SCWM/ERP_EWM_INTEGRATIONEWM: ERP IntegrationObsolete 
/SCWM/EWM_TO_DAS_INTEGRATIONTechnical Role for EWM Integration to Dock Appointment SchedulingObsolete 
/SCWM/EXPERTEWM: Warehouse ExpertObsolete 
/SCWM/EXPERT_2Obsolete after 7.02 – use role /SCWM/EXPERTObsolete 
/SCWM/IDM_EWM_INTEGRATIONEWM: Identity Management IntegrationObsolete 
/SCWM/INBD_SPECIALISTEWM: Warehouse Specialist for Goods ReceiptObsolete 
/SCWM/INFORMATIONEWM: Display of Warehouse InformationObsolete 
/SCWM/INVENTORY_PLANNEREWM: Inventory PlannerObsolete 
/SCWM/LM_PLANNEREWM: Labor PlannerObsolete 
/SCWM/LM_SPECIALISTEWM: Labor SpecialistObsolete 
/SCWM/MENU_S4Menu for Extended Warehouse Management in S/4HANA 
/SCWM/OUTBD_SPECIALISTEWM: Warehouse Specialist for Goods IssueObsolete 
/SCWM/SO_CLERKEWM: Shipping Office ClerkObsolete 
/SCWM/SUPERVISOREWM: Warehouse SupervisorObsolete 
/SCWM/WB_ADMINISTRATORAdministrator for Warehouse BillingObsolete 
/SCWM/WB_SPECIALISTSpecialist for Warehouse BillingObsolete 
/SCWM/WORKEREWM: Warehouse WorkerObsolete 
/SCWM/YARD_SPECIALISTEWM: Warehouse Specialist for Yard ManagementObsolete

entry.title: No Successor App available for Manage Catalog Item Recommendations (F3293)
entry.content:
Hello SAP Support Team,

Good day!

Raising this request for assistance to look/find a possible successor or related app to Manage Catalog Item Recommendations that can still do the same functionality.

We appreciate any help/assistance in any way.

Thanks!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Any solution to Backflush/Issue Customer stock B for REM Order (Planned Order)
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I have a requirement regarding Backflush/Goods Issue Component (with indicator special stock - B) in a REM Order (Planned Order).

During testing, I found that I am unable to backflush a component with the special stock indicator B for a REM Order. I have also searched for relevant notes or documentation but couldn’t find any information on backflushing components with this indicator.

I would greatly appreciate your guidance on this matter.

Best regards,

entry.title: Capacity Planning
entry.content:
Hi Experts, how can I optimize capacity planning to avoid overloads and improve production efficiency? I'm trying to configure work center capacities and adjust shift patterns to balance workloads while ensuring on-time production orders.

Regards,

Dafina

entry.title: I have started the SUM procedure, but I am getting the error "The content couldn't be loaded" Can an
entry.content:
Hi Team I have started SUM while loading its contents in the browser I am getting
"The content couldn't be loaded"
can anyone help me understand why is this error getting?

entry.title: Can we add material multiple selection in MD02 in the Fiori app version?
entry.content:
Dear all,

We have detected that the multiple selection is not possible in MD2 when connected in the Fiori app.

Is it possible to active the multi selection material? By multiple selection I mean a copy paste of a list of material and not a click on "add" to enter material one by one.

Thank you

Ingrid

entry.title: SAP version mismatch after S/4 conversion
entry.content:
Dear Support

After conversion system to S/4, from SAP version ERP EHP 6 to SAP version S/4 2023,gGoing to the
Installed Product Version
I see the two versions at the same time (see attachment)

Could you help me understand?
If so, is it possible to delete the old entry?

entry.title: Question About ''Group'' of BP Category
entry.content:
Hello everyone!
I’m working on an ECC-to-S/4HANA conversion tasks, and I have a question about the “Group” BP category. Specifically:
・What are the advantage of “Group” category? 
→In what scenarios or for what reasons is “Group” preferable to “Person” or “Organization”?

・Exclusive fields: 
→Are there any fields or functionalities that can only be used with “Group”?

Any insights would be greatly appreciated. Thank you in advance for your support.

Best regards,
Kou

entry.title: Does BADI MD_CHANGE_MRP_DATA still work with MRP live?
entry.content:
Dear Gurus,

I would like to know if BADI MD_CHANGE_MRP_DATA still works with MRP live (S/4 HANA).

If not, is there a new one that makes the job for considering consignment stock?

Thank you all.
